reviews.review_description: The game is not realistic as you can see in the photos and the afwering is also not so good and I think They need to come with a update that you can throttle as you do in real life on a motorcycle

developer_response.body: Hi, While Moto Racing aims to provide an exciting and accessible racing experience, achieving complete realism might not be the sole focus for all players. We understand that some users prefer a more realistic experience, and your feedback is valuable in helping us understand player preferences.We are trying to improve our controller in coming updates. Happy Racing!

reviews.review_description: Played through the game and enjoyed it. Had a bug where the bike engine sound was not present at all when I started in the highway mode and didn't come back when I went to do a race again. Would be really cool if a motocross track and bikes where added. Would for sure pay for that add on! Pretty good overall for the price.

developer_response.body: Dear User, Thanks for playing MotoVRX. Its a great pleasure for us that you liked our game. We will consider your suggestions in our future updates, stay tuned.

reviews.review_description: U try to turn it won't work angle it as much as u like its a waste of money never buy it like u can use some money on a 4000 dollar in game motorcycle and it takes all of ur starter money

developer_response.body: Hi, We understand your concerns about the cost of in-game motorcycles. We strive to offer a balanced in-game economy that allows players to progress without requiring excessive spending. We are constantly evaluating and adjusting the in-game economy based on player feedback.

reviews.review_description:
Love this for once someone has made a good driving experience with steering mechanics that not just works but feel real with the controller…. One thing I feel might be useful is if you twist the controller angle as so ur holding a handle bar to give a more accurate feel 
I know this is a bit of a brain smacking thing to do ( the program ing side of development is the hardest bit lol ) but great work and I look forward to seeing more from you on not just oculus but the future vr headsets.

developer_response.body: Dear User, Thank you so much for your 5-star review! We will share your review with our team to let them know to keep up the amazing work. Any suggestions are welcome at admin@skippyapps.com.

reviews.review_description: it is a fun game but the steering was not good it would not work so i could not play but if that was fixed then it would me a five star game

developer_response.body: Hi, Thank you for your feedback! We're glad you find Moto Racing fun to play, but we're very sorry to hear you're experiencing issues with the steering. We understand how this can be frustrating and prevent you from enjoying the game fully. We are currently working on it and will be improved in coming updates.

reviews.review_description: First bike racing game. Remind me of a bike racing arcade

developer_response.body: Dear Player, Thanks for playing out game. We would like to now how we can get better rating from you. Do try our other games.
